body:
Fix and finish the RelayListener scheduled task setup end-to-end, autonomously, iterating until it actually works. Do not stop at the first success message -- verify with Get-ScheduledTaskInfo and confirm LastTaskResult is 0 after a real run.

Source files are at: C:\Users\User\Desktop\Work\# EX MACHINA\focus\x_strategies ix\relay-listener.ps1 and install-relay-listener.ps1

Known issues already hit (fix all of these in the scripts before running):
1. pwsh.exe alias at C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps\pwsh.exe does not work reliably from Scheduled Tasks (non-interactive context). Try, in priority order: (a) C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe (MSI install, confirmed exists), (b) C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerShell_7.6.3.0_x64__8wekyb3d8bbwe\pwsh.exe as fallback if accessible, (c) error out clearly if neither works -- do not silently fall back to the alias.
2. Scheduled Task RepetitionDuration must NOT use [TimeSpan]::MaxValue or a large New-TimeSpan -Days value -- both produce invalid/out-of-range XML duration errors. Correct approach: create the trigger, then set \$trigger.Repetition.Duration = "" (empty string) for indefinite repetition.
3. Add -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass to the scheduled task's launch arguments so RemoteSigned policy doesn't block it.
4. Unblock-File any script downloaded/copied before executing it (Mark-of-the-Web blocks unsigned scripts even under RemoteSigned).
5. Wrap Register-ScheduledTask in try/catch and only print a success message if it actually succeeded -- never claim success on failure.

After fixing: unregister any existing RelayListener task, re-run the install script, then run Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName RelayListener, wait 10 seconds, and check Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName RelayListener for LastTaskResult -eq 0.

Then do a real end-to-end test: confirm the unprocessed cold-start test message (id 31b8c3c7) in messages/from-chat/ gets picked up and processed within 2 minutes, and a new PowerShell window with Claude Code actually opens.

Report back via the relay with final status: working or not, and what was needed to fix it.
